President Barack Obama meets with students prior to a My Brother’s Keeper initiative town hall hosted by ESPN at North Carolina A&T State University, in Greensboro, North Carolina, Oct. 11, 2016. Participants include: Frank Cobbs IV, MBK-Fulton County, GA, St. Johns College in NYC (Age 22); Devin Edwards, MBK-Boston, Bunker Hill Community College in Greater Boston (Age 22); Marcell Payton, MBK-Detroit, Central State University in Wilberforce, Ohio (Age 19); Edward Teasley, NC A&T State University, Minority Male Makers Program (Age 19); Quamiir Trice, MBK-Philadelphia, Howard University in Washington, DC (Age 20); Marcelo Claure, CEO, Sprint, MBK Alliance Board Member; Blair Taylor, CEO, MBK Alliance; and Broderick Johnson, Chair, MBK Task Force. (Official White House Photo by Pete Souza)
